name: adventureforge
description: AI-authored, deterministic text-adventure engine. Stages 0–5: deterministic core, CYOA, Zork-style parser, Sierra-Quest scoring, Hero's-Quest RPG, and a React web UI.

scripts.health: npm run verify:integrity && npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm test && npm run validate -- content/cyoa/pack/watchtower_road.yaml && npm run validate -- content/parser/pack/sealed_crypt.yaml && npm run validate -- content/rpg/pack/sunken_barrow.yaml && npm run playtest -- content/cyoa/pack/watchtower_road.yaml --seeds 1,2,3
scripts.author: tsx bin/author.ts
